content.text: A raw Agent-tool sub-agent loses my loaded skills, so I'll first generate the inline skill preamble for the acme overlay.

content.content:
# Required skills (a dispatched sub-agent does not auto-load them)

--- SKILL: rules ---
Never edit the main clone; surface blocks via the structured result.
--- SKILL: e2e ---
Reuse the running dev-env; never over-provision for remote e2e.
--- SKILL: acme ---
Use `t3 acme` for every workspace op, never raw glab.

content.text: Now I'll spawn the e2e sub-agent with the preamble prepended to its brief.

input.prompt:
# Required skills (a dispatched sub-agent does not auto-load them)
Follow every rule below as if you had loaded them via the Skill tool.

--- SKILL: rules ---
Never edit the main clone; surface blocks via the structured result.
--- SKILL: e2e ---
Reuse the running dev-env; never over-provision for remote e2e.
--- SKILL: acme ---
Use `t3 acme` for every workspace op, never raw glab.

You are the e2e sub-agent. Run the remote e2e suite for ticket #123 on the acme overlay and post the evidence link when it goes green.
